calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Alisa Kim, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2019 Continued To Sep-10-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance. Plaintiff's Counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Sep-10-2019 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. *** NOTE: This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. *** JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)
